chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Rev. Appl. No. 62 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 18.02.2025 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case For hearing of MA 3034/21 Mr. Zahoor Ahmed Baloch, Advocate for applicant Ms. Sana Memon, APG Mr. Zahoor Ahmed Baloch learned Counsel for Applicant states that on instruction he does not press the instant Cr. Rev. Application which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
